box_on_goal_count: How many boxes are on their matching colored goal dots?
How many boxes are sitting on their matching colored goal dots?
How many crates have been pushed onto their matching colored goal dots?
How many boxes currently rest on their matching colored goal dots?
How many boxes are correctly placed on matching colored goal dots?
box_off_goal_count: How many boxes are not on their matching colored goal dots?
How many boxes are off their matching colored goal dots?
How many crates have not been pushed onto their matching colored goal dots?
How many boxes are currently away from their matching colored goal dots?
How many boxes are not correctly placed on matching colored goal dots?
closest_box_goal_label: Which labeled box is closest to its matching colored goal dot by Manhattan distance? Ignore walls, boxes, the player, and other board objects.
Select the box label whose box is nearest to its same-colored goal dot by Manhattan distance, ignoring walls, boxes, the player, and other objects.
Using Manhattan distance between each box and its matching colored goal dot, which labeled box is closest? Ignore all walls and objects on the board.
Compare each labeled box with its same-colored goal dot. Which box has the smallest Manhattan distance when walls, boxes, and other objects are ignored?
Which box label identifies the box closest to its matching colored goal dot by Manhattan distance? Ignore walls and any other board objects.
push_stand_cell_label: Which labeled square should the player stand on to push the {target_color_label} box straight onto its matching {target_color_label} goal dot?
Where should the player stand to push the {target_color_label} box straight into its matching {target_color_label} goal dot?
Select the labeled square where the player needs to stand so the {target_color_label} box can be pushed straight onto its matching goal dot.
Which labeled player position lets the {target_color_label} box be pushed in a straight line to its matching {target_color_label} goal dot?
Choose the labeled square the player should stand on before pushing the {target_color_label} box straight into its matching goal dot.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_box_goal_status_count: a Sokoban board with walls, a player, colored boxes, and colored goal dots; a box on its matching goal has the goal dot drawn on top of the box
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_closest_box_goal_labe: a Sokoban board with walls, a player, lettered colored boxes, and matching colored goal dots; no box is already on its matching goal
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_push_stand_cell_label: a Sokoban board with walls, a player, colored boxes, matching colored goal dots, and four labeled candidate standing squares around one box
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_box_goal_count: set "answer" to the number of boxes satisfying the question
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_option_letter: set "answer" to the selected box letter
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_option_letter_stand_cell: set "answer" to the selected standing-square letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_counted_box_bbox_set: set "annotation" to a JSON array of image-pixel box-cell bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1], one for each counted box; use [] if none are counted
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_selected_box_bbox: set "annotation" to the selected box-cell bounding box as [x0,y0,x1,y1] in image pixels
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_selected_stand_cell_bbox: set "annotation" to the selected standing-square cell bounding box as [x0,y0,x1,y1] in image pixels
